title: Missing simulation-level reception metrics in callback RX path
description:
## Location
python/src/lichen/sim/simulation.py:781

## Description
The _get_rx_result_internal method (used by deliver_pending_packets for callback-based RX mode) updates per-node metrics via node.metrics.record_rx() at line 787, but does NOT call self._metrics.record_reception() like get_rx_result does at line 867. This causes simulation-level metrics (receptions count, delivery_rate, latency_stats) to be incorrect when using callback-based RX mode.

## Failure Scenario
Test creates two nodes A and B. Node A transmits, Node B receives via enter_rx_mode/deliver_pending_packets (callback path). After test completes, simulation.metrics.receptions returns 0 and delivery_rate returns 0.0, even though the packet was successfully delivered and node B's per-node rx_count is 1. Any analysis relying on simulation.metrics.delivery_rate or latency_stats() will have incorrect data.

## Category
correctness
